Petition For Instructions And Authority To Pay Funds For Automobile Purchase
Off Calendar Jul-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner)

Mr. Der stated that DHCS refused to sign declaration supporting purchase of automobile, and submitted his own declaration. The Court granted the petition for instruction and authority to pay funds for auto purchase (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions And Authority To Pay Funds For Automobile Purchase
Off Calendar Jun-13-2018 Continued To Jul-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions And Authority To Pay Funds For Automobile Purchase
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Continued To Jun-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch

The Court noted that he is inclined to deny this petition. Mr. Der stated that he personally spoke with the case worker at DHCS, that the car would be purchased with Debra Dolch as the lienholder, and DHCS does not object to the family using the car the other 2/3 of the time when not used for the conservatee. The Petition for Instructions, etc. is continued to June 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for counsel to obtain a declaration from DHCS.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

The Court stated that it did not have a problem with the accounting but that it was not inclined to change the Trustee for various reasons and that there just wasn't enough of a track record to substitute the parents in as Co-Trustees. Mr. Der stated that this was the parents petition, that the parents have counsel, and that he would let counsel know. The Court approved the third account but denied the request to substitute the Trustee and change of venue. Mr. Der is email the modified order to the Probate Examiner.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.
